assertions.assertion: Configures UseForwardedHeaders with ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedFor and ForwardedHeaders.XForwardedProto
Places UseForwardedHeaders before UseAuthentication in the middleware pipeline
Configures UsePathBase('/app') for the sub-path mount
Mentions SameSite cookie configuration (Lax for cross-site IDP) as a potential contributing factor
assertions.rationale: Explains SameSite Lax is needed for cross-site IDP and Strict causes issues after redirect
